Month_Year: The month and year when the mentioned improvement was made in the inventory shrinkage reporting.
Person_Responsible: The name of the person who made the improvement in the inventory shrinkage reporting.
Action: The specific action or method implemented to improve inventory shrinkage reporting.
Starting_Shrinkage_Rate: The inventory shrinkage rate before the improvement was made.
Ending_Shrinkage_Rate: The inventory shrinkage rate after the improvement was made.
Shrinkage_Rate_Change: The change in inventory shrinkage rate as a result of the implemented improvement.
